items.title: How Banofi is turning banana waste into India's answer to leather
items.summary: Jinali Mody couldn't find a sustainable leather bag, so she built Banofi, turning banana waste into luxury vegan leather that's winning over fashion.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
